---
title: "Proposal"
format: revealjs
---

# Anticipated Challenges

**Data Volume & Missing Information**

* Our 311 request dataset (2020–Present) contains 20,259,421 rows of data
* Missing resolution descriptions for many requests
* Some requests marked “closed” without clear resolution

# Anticipated Challenges

**Data Source Location Segmentation**

* 311 request dataset has borough, longitude, and latitude
* Other datasets use neighborhoods or lots
* Must map longitude/latitude to neighborhood boundaries to merge datasets
